s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR DUCT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Release the 4 claws and remove the air duct sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR FILTER COVER PLATE (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Release the 2 claws and remove the air filter cover plate.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CLEAN AIR FILTER (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the clean air filter as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR INLET SERVO MOTOR (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws and air inlet servo motor.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE BLOWER WITH FAN MOTOR SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws and blower with fan motor sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR DUCT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 claws and then remove the air duct sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR FILTER COVER PLATE (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Release the 2 claws and remove the air filter cover plate.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CLEAN AIR FILTER (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the clean air filter as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR INLET SERVO MOTOR (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws and air inlet servo motor.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE BLOWER WITH FAN MOTOR SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws and blower with fan motor sub-assembly.
